question: What text is visible on the yellow sign in the background during the scene with the totem poles on the floor? A. SILVER B. John Buxton C. ArtTrak.com D. S
How many totem pole sculptures are standing on the blue table between the two men?
Which color is painted on the tallest totem pole along with black and white geometric patterns?
What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: Three painted totem poles with geometric patterns stand in the foreground. People walk around the sculptures while they rest on the floor in a crowded room. Two men stand behind a blue table where the sculptures are displayed. One man gestures with a pointer while the other leans on the table surface.

Describe the sequence of events involving the totem poles and the people around them from the beginning to the end of the video.
canonical_answer: At 0s, three painted totem poles stand on the floor among a crowd; at 4s, a woman in a white shirt walks past the sculptures on the right; at 12s, the poles appear on a blue table between two men; at 14s, the man in the suit gestures with his hand while speaking.
